subcodes.first_line: O ye who are intoxicated with the wine of God's love! Be ye detached from the world of matter and drink from the sweet cup of the divine Cup-bearer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمستان باده محبت الله از جهان عنصری بیزار باشید و از کاس خوشگوار ساقی
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity; oneness of humanity
